cards.rulesText: If a unit here would die during combat, its controller may pay [rainbow][rainbow][rainbow] to heal it, exhaust it, and recall it instead.

effect.description: If a unit here would die during combat, its controller may pay :rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow::rb_rune_rainbow: to heal it, exhaust it, and recall it instead

cards.name: Amateur Recital
cards.rulesText: When you hold here, you may move a unit at a battlefield to its base.

cards.name: Black Flame Altar
cards.rulesText: Units here with [Temporary] have [Shield]. (+1 [Might] while they're defenders.)

effect.description: [Temporary] have

cards.name: Dusk Rose Lab
cards.rulesText: At the start of your Beginning Phase, you may kill a unit you control here to draw 1. (This happens before scoring.)

cards.name: Forbidding Waste
cards.rulesText: While a unit here is defending alone, it has -2 [Might]. (It's alone if there are no other friendly units here.)

cards.name: Forgotten Library
cards.rulesText: While you control this battlefield, when you play a spell, if you spent [4] or more, [Predict]. (Look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

effect.description: While you control this battlefield, when you play a spell, if you spent :rb_energy_4: or more, [Predict]

cards.name: Frozen Fortress
cards.rulesText: At the start of each player's Beginning Phase, deal 1 to each unit here. (This happens before scoring.)

cards.name: Gardens of Becoming
cards.rulesText: Units here have "[Exhaust]: Gain 1 XP."

effect.description: Units here have ":rb_exhaust:: Gain 1 XP."

cards.name: Ripper's Bay
cards.rulesText: When a unit here is returned to a player's hand, that player may pay [1] to channel 1 rune exhausted.

effect.description: that player may pay :rb_energy_1: to channel 1 rune exhausted

cards.name: Star Spring
cards.rulesText: The first time a player plays a non-token unit here each turn, they may move another unit they control here to its base.

effect.description: they may move another unit they control here to its base

cards.name: The Academy
cards.rulesText: When you hold here, give your next spell this turn [Repeat] equal to its base cost. (You may pay the additional cost to repeat the spell's effect.)

effect.description: give your next spell this turn [Repeat] equal to its base cost

cards.name: Trapping Grounds
cards.rulesText: When you conquer here, if you assigned 3 or more excess damage, play a 1 [Might] Bird unit token with [Deflect].

cards.name: Valley of Idols
cards.rulesText: When a player plays a unit here, they may pay [1] to [Buff] it. (Give it a +1 [Might] buff if it doesn't have one.)

effect.description: When a player plays a unit here, they may pay :rb_energy_1: to [Buff] it

cards.name: Vaults of Helia
cards.rulesText: When you hold here, your non-token units cost [1] more to play this turn.

effect.description: your non-token units cost :rb_energy_1: more to play this turn
